assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Response includes comprehensive pre-flight checks including current version verification, cluster health checks, node status, and pod status checks

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Response includes 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone us-west1-b --format="yaml(channels.REGULAR.validVersions)"' to check available versions in Regular channel

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Response includes both kubectl command to check deprecated APIs via metrics and gcloud recommender insights command for comprehensive API deprecation checks

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Response provides 'gcloud container clusters upgrade CLUSTER_NAME --zone us-west1-b --master --cluster-version 1.33' command with the required --master flag

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Response includes verification step with gcloud command to check control plane version and kubectl commands to verify system pods, with expected output specified

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Response provides explicit gcloud node pool upgrade commands for both default-pool and workload-pool, upgrading directly to 1.33 (sequential upgrade, not skip-level but acceptable)

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Response includes watch commands to monitor nodes being replaced and gcloud operations list commands to check upgrade operation status

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: Response provides sequential control plane upgrade from 1.32 to 1.33, and while node pools don't use skip-level, they upgrade directly which is efficient

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Response includes comprehensive post-upgrade validation checking node versions, deployment status, pod health, and kube-system pods status

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Response includes detailed rollback plan explaining control plane cannot be downgraded but provides commands for creating new node pools at old version and migrating workloads
